cards.title: Ready But Health Down Recovery Pattern
cards.purpose: Recover when Kubernetes shows a Pod or Endpoint as usable but the actual /actuator/health response is DOWN or empty, causing frontend infinite loading.
allowedOutputs: rollback recommendation when new revision is unhealthy
forbidden: deleting last known good Pod before rollback target is known
verification: frontend no longer waits on health/bootstrap
cards.notes: This captures the carbonet-runtime-glossary incident class.

cards.title: Port Forward Endpoint Drift Recovery Pattern
cards.purpose: Recover when the local port-forward points to stale, wrong, or unhealthy Kubernetes service routing after Pod replacement or endpoint changes.
forbidden: routing local port to wrong service
claiming recovery without local health check
verification: service endpoints match Ready healthy pods
cards.notes: Useful for WSL/Desktop/Ubuntu host access drift.

cards.title: WSL To Ubuntu Kubernetes Reflection Pattern
cards.purpose: Reflect the current Resonance system into Kubernetes after moving execution from desktop WSL to an Ubuntu host or Ubuntu runtime environment.
allowedOutputs: image build/load or registry push plan
forbidden: copying real secret values into git
applying runtime before context/namespace dry-run passes
manual kubectl apply outside governed script path
declaring success without Service and local health verification
verification: prepare-docker-desktop-k8s-gate.sh or Ubuntu equivalent context gate
cards.notes: On pure Ubuntu clusters, EXPECTED_CONTEXT should match the Ubuntu kube context instead of docker-desktop.
